Full breakdown with strategic priority rating
Consulting-grade action plan to restore and improve profitability

Discount rates grew 15% → 36% over FY 2023, the single largest profit drain. Orders above 35% discount earn just 28.7% margin vs 61.2% at low discounts. Introduce segment-based caps: Budget ≤ 20%, Regular ≤ 25%, Premium → shift to loyalty rewards instead.

Mumbai delivery costs ₹79/order vs ₹51 in Jaipur — a 55% gap. 75% of Mumbai/Delhi orders exceed the 38-minute SLA, directly lowering ratings. Introduce micro-zone clustering and dark store expansion in high-cost corridors to cut Tier-1 delivery cost 18% in 90 days.

Premium customers generate 2.3× higher profit/order (₹222 vs ₹55 for Budget) and repeat 65% of the time. Launch Zomato Gold 2.0: priority delivery SLA, loyalty cashback (replacing discounts), and chef's table partnerships — targeting conversion of 15% of Regular users to Premium.

Jaipur (60%), Surat (60.9%), and Ahmedabad (57.6%) have 10–14 pp higher profit margins than Mumbai/Delhi due to lower delivery costs and less aggressive discount competition. Redirect 30% of marketing spend to accelerate these markets, targeting +40% order volume in 12 months.
